Metadata.title: DramaBox — Short dramas
Metadata.description: Discover short drama series you will love.

Header.accountToastDesc: Sign-in (Google / Apple / Facebook) would open in a modal — this demo is not connected.

Footer.socialUnsetHint: Set NEXT_PUBLIC_SOCIAL_* in .env to enable this link
Footer.disclaimer: © Learning demo — not affiliated with DramaBox. Legal pages and support routes are hosted on this site; set contact and social URLs in .env.

Banner.body: More great content lives in the app — this demo only recreates the web UI.
Banner.openToastDesc: The demo is not linked to an official store listing.

Hero.emptyCarousel: No carousel titles yet. Sign in to admin and enable “Carousel” on a movie.

Genres.title: All genres
Genres.description: This page mirrors the Browse tab on dramaboxdb: a genre list that leads into filtered titles.
Genres.detailIntroBefore: Demo: shows the full catalog. In production, the API would filter by genre

SearchPage.title: Search
SearchPage.empty: No matching titles. Try another keyword.

Content.metaDescription: Articles and resources (demo), similar to /content on dramaboxdb.
Content.title: Resources
Content.introBefore: Article hub (SEO / reviews). Each item links to
Content.bodyPlaceholder: Placeholder body copy. Swap in MDX or CMS content. Paths mirror the /content model on dramaboxdb.

Movie.noSynopsis: No extended synopsis in this demo.
Movie.noPlayback: No playback source has been added yet.
Movie.playbackNotSupported: Your browser does not support this playback source.

Business.title: Business partnerships
Business.introAfter: on dramaboxdb. In production, copy usually routes inquiries by partnership type.

LegalTerms.title: Terms of use
LegalTerms.p1: These terms govern your use of this demo website. By browsing or using the service, you agree to them.
LegalTerms.p2: The site is provided for learning and demonstration. Content, availability, and features may change without notice.
LegalTerms.p3: You agree not to misuse the service (including attempting unauthorized access, scraping in ways that harm performance, or violating applicable law).
LegalTerms.p4: Intellectual property: branding and UI patterns shown here are illustrative. Third-party names may appear for comparison only.
LegalTerms.p5: Disclaimer: the service is provided “as is” without warranties to the extent permitted by law.
LegalTerms.p6: We may update these terms; continued use after changes means you accept the revised version.

LegalPrivacy.title: Privacy policy
LegalPrivacy.p1: This policy explains what data this demo may process and why.
LegalPrivacy.p2: When you browse pages, typical web logs (such as IP address, user agent, and timestamps) may be stored by hosting infrastructure for security and debugging.
LegalPrivacy.p3: If you contact us by email, we process your message content and address to respond.
LegalPrivacy.p4: Admin sign-in uses a session cookie (HTTP-only) to keep you signed in; it is not readable by page scripts.
LegalPrivacy.p5: We do not sell your personal data. Analytics or third-party trackers are not required for this demo unless you add them later.
LegalPrivacy.p6: Depending on your region, you may have rights to access, correct, or delete personal data. Contact the DPO route for requests.
LegalPrivacy.p7: If this demo is extended with accounts or payments, this policy should be reviewed with legal counsel before production use.

LegalCookies.title: Cookie policy
LegalCookies.p1: This site may use cookies and similar technologies only as needed for basic operation.
LegalCookies.p2: Session cookies: if you use admin features, an HTTP-only cookie stores your signed session token.
LegalCookies.p3: Preference cookies: theme (light/dark) may be stored locally in the browser for usability.
LegalCookies.p4: You can control cookies through your browser settings. Blocking essential cookies may break sign-in.
LegalCookies.p5: If you add marketing or analytics cookies later, list them here and obtain consent where required.

LegalDpo.title: Data protection officer (DPO)
LegalDpo.p1: For privacy-related questions or requests (including access or deletion where applicable), contact the address below.
LegalDpo.p2suffix: is the designated contact for this demo configuration.
LegalDpo.p3: Please include enough detail for us to verify and fulfill your request. Response times depend on complexity and applicable law.
LegalDpo.p4: Replace the default mailbox in .env with your organization’s official DPO inbox before production.

Support.title: Customer support
Support.p1: This page replaces the placeholder “support” toast. Use it for FAQs, contact options, and links to related areas.
Support.p2prefix: For feedback about the demo, email

Account.title: Account
Account.p1: End-user sign-in (Google / Apple / Facebook, etc.) is not wired in this demo.
Account.p2: Movie editors can use the admin area with email and password after seeding the database.
Account.p3: When you add a real consumer account system, replace this page with profile, subscriptions, and device management.

Careers.title: Careers
Careers.p1: We are a demo project; this page is a template for job inquiries.
Careers.p3: Update NEXT_PUBLIC_JOBS_EMAIL in .env to your HR inbox.

Community.title: Community
Community.intro: Follow the project on social networks. URLs come from environment variables so you can swap them without code changes.
Community.envHint: Set NEXT_PUBLIC_SOCIAL_FACEBOOK_URL, NEXT_PUBLIC_SOCIAL_YOUTUBE_URL, and NEXT_PUBLIC_SOCIAL_TIKTOK_URL in .env.

Admin.title: Movie admin
Admin.loginHint: Default account: admin@example.com / changeme (change in .env and re-seed).
Admin.errorRateLimit: Too many attempts. Please wait a few minutes and try again.
